Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Little Blue]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Little Blue is a Sylvan that sits on Lindon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Little Blue is also known as the Riverseed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Little Blue's power can scrub a spirit clean of Blackflame aura buildup.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Little Blue is kept in a tank.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Little Blue is a real spirit or Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Little Blue is made of ocean-blue madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Little Blue cleansed some of Lindon's madra channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Little Blue is one of Lindon's belongings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Little Blue is a creature that clings to Lindon's hair and makes high-pitched burbles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Little Blue can soothe Lindon's channels and spirit with a cold spark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Little Blue is a character that pops up from inside Lindon's robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Little Blue has an ocean-blue body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue is seated on Lindon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue was kept in her case by Lindon's captors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Little Blue's power washes madra channels clean and does not expel parasites.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Little Blue attempted to heal Lindon's shattered spirit.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Little Blue is the Sylvan Riverseed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Little Blue is a spirit that looks like a woman made of deep blue madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon needs Little Blue's help to recover.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Little Blue is a creature that lives in a habitat consisting of two halves lying in the sand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Little Blue is a creature that scurried up Lindon's back and onto his head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Little Blue is a creature that chirps.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Little Blue is an entity that jumps on Orthos' head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Little Blue has a healing touch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Little Blue is a creature that was curled on the floor near Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Little Blue does not need to sleep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Little Blue is in no shape to provide treatment for Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue is a spirit that can be stored in Lindon's pocket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Little Blue is a creature that can touch and affect madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue can cleanse and reinforce madra channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Little Blue is a deep ocean blue spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Little Blue is a small creature that chimes like a bell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Little Blue is a creature that can flood Orthos with power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Little Blue tumbled onto the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Little Blue's pure core is Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Little Blue is a Sylvan that squeaks and can whistle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Little Blue is located in void storage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Little Blue is a creature that crawled out of Lindon's pocket.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Little Blue is a tiny spirit in the shape of a woman made of deep blue light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Little Blue is a small creature that can reach six inches in height.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Little Blue clings to Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Little Blue is a creature that accompanies Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Little Blue is a character that reacts to Lindon's surprise.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Little Blue was inside a bundle of firewood within the void key space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Little Blue is playing with Suriel’s marble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Little Blue is a spirit that applauds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Little Blue is a creature that sits on Lindon's collar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Little Blue is a creature that can be held in Lindon's Remnant fingers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Little Blue is in Lindon's pocket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Little Blue listened to Lindon's story.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Little Blue is a creature that Lindon can cycle Heaven's Drop to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Little Blue is a creature that sobs with a sound like pattering rain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Little Blue is a Sylvan with an ocean-blue face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon may ask Little Blue for help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Little Blue's power is deep blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Little Blue is currently too weak to be unaffected by the boundary field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Little Blue has gone with Lindon.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Little Blue is a creature that hides behind Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Little Blue can relieve pain in Lindon's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Little Blue communicates through a series of chimes and whistles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Little Blue injected soothing madra into Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Little Blue can help Lindon with his core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Little Blue is a spirit that Lindon can pull from his soulspace.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Little Blue sleeps in a flowerpot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Little Blue stood on Lindon's head to watch the match.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Little Blue leans on Lindon's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Little Blue covered her eyes during the match.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Little Blue is a spirit that can produce a mournful flute note.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Little Blue is a spirit that can climb on Lindon's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Little Blue is a creature that can roll a scale across a desk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Little Blue is a creature with detail or real intelligence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Little Blue is a naturally formed spirit of pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Little Blue has ocean-blue hair and wears a sapphire dress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Little Blue can fly on a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Little Blue's madra is blue and provides support for Lindon's techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue channeled madra into the priest from Lindon's pocket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue is kept inside Lindon's void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue's presence empowers Lindon's pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Little Blue berated Lindon for not accepting her help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Little Blue runs around the deck of Eithan's cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Little Blue is a trembling creature held by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon has a bond with Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Little Blue attempted to pull Lindon and Ruby's hands apart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Little Blue stood on Lindon's chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Little Blue provided encouragement to Lindon.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Little Blue is a creature that can communicate through a bond and rings a bell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Little Blue gave a loud peep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Little Blue is a character who regards Yerin with concern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon can slip Little Blue into his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Little Blue sits on Orthos's head and communicates with chirps and ringing tones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Little Blue is seated on the table.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Little Blue is one foot in height.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue gave a whistle of alarm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Little Blue is with Lindon and Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Little Blue sits atop Orthos' head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Little Blue has seen to the recovery of Mercy and Ziel.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Little Blue is an ocean-blue woman about a foot tall who drives a small cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Little Blue expressed reluctance to fight another Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Little Blue is a character whose attention was not enough to restore Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Little Blue is a companion of Lindon who can whistle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Little Blue wears a dress with ocean blue madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Little Blue has grown addicted to training Kelsa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Little Blue burbled that she did not feel well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Little Blue is present with the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue made a tinkling sound in agreement with Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue cheered at the thrill of the leap.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon reinforced his protection of Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Little Blue's voice rang with her impatience.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue whispered comfort to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Little Blue is missing from Lindon's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Little Blue is a creature that clings to Orthos' back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Little Blue is a spirit with a high level of existence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon hid Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Little Blue glared at Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Little Blue cheered the new hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Little Blue is a character that rings like a bell when panicked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Little Blue is a listener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Little Blue is Orthos's partner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Little Blue was one of the captives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Little Blue was being held by Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Little Blue felt shock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Little Blue gave an offended clang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Little Blue's trembling sounded like the jingling of glass shards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Little Blue trembles in terror before Eithan's true power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Little Blue hugged Eithan's shin.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Little Blue can purify corruption of her spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Little Blue can consume spirits to grow more powerful.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Little Blue is inside Yerin's soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Little Blue is a spirit that resides in Yerin's soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Little Blue can pull a hunger spear out of Yerin's soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Little Blue is a spirit that can absorb power and turns purple when doing so.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Little Blue is a spirit that can emerge from soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Little Blue is a companion of Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Little Blue is a spirit that can experience pain and power fluctuations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Little Blue's power is clashing with red light inside her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Little Blue cycles her madra with an inner focus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Little Blue was passed by the Blood Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Little Blue is a creature that cooed a question to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Little Blue is on Yerin's shoulder and can whisper to her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Little Blue cheered like frozen bells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Little Blue is a character who can cheer and run around on Orthos' head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Little Blue rang out like a bell to wish Lindon and Yerin good luck.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Little Blue is a character present with Lindon and Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Little Blue applauded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Little Blue's body flickers purple during training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Little Blue is a creature that can inspire Orthos with her energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is concerned that Little Blue may only be following him because he and Yerin want her to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Little Blue defended Orthos and herself by deflecting madra attacks and disrupting spiritual power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Little Blue is at a level comparable to Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Little Blue was standing on Mercy's stomach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue was training in a cycling position inside the Blackflame cycling chamber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue wished Orthos constant encouragement while he fought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue's madra flooded through Orthos's channels to cool them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue opened Lindon's void key to take out Archlord natural treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Little Blue resembles a woman with pale blue, solid and opaque skin and deep navy hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Little Blue is a spirit who can take the body of a grown human woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Little Blue has a contracted bond with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Little Blue advanced to Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Little Blue's advancement to Herald involved her spirit manifesting physically into a body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Little Blue radiates dream and blood aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Little Blue can speak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon clashed against the Weeping Dragon with Orthos and Little Blue behind him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Little Blue wiped out Striker techniques by the dozen with an Empty Palm the size of her new human body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Little Blue's techniques were magnified by Lindon’s madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Little Blue struck the Dragon with an Empty Palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Little Blue is pursued by a swarm of lightning-dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Little Blue possesses a copy of Dross in her hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Little Blue unleashed techniques to block the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Little Blue is someone Ziel was protecting from the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Akura Malice's shadows crept up to Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Little Blue worked on Ziel's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Little Blue used pure madra to soothe Mercy's cracked madra channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Little Blue would have a difficult time establishing authority over the Weeping Dragon's binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Little Blue nodded at Lindon's words.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Little Blue is no longer six inches tall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Little Blue is a spirit that was crying with Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Little Blue struggled to defeat a shadow sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Little Blue was taking a beating.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Little Blue uses a Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Little Blue's spirit was fading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Little Blue is not supposed to be where she is and uses pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Little Blue drew from Lindon's cores.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Little Blue can use an Empty Palm technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Little Blue flanks Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Little Blue can stand at human height.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue is a Sylvan Riverseed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue is a monster that laughs like tinkling bells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue can assume a human-sized form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue can use the Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue uses harsh chimes to communicate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue is a character who can hold a feathered dragon with both hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue is a character who snores like wind through silver leaves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue is present during the unloading of the crates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue is a creature that sits atop Orthos's shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue can wipe out techniques with pure madra and crush them with sheer strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue can grow to human size.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue uses an Empty Palm attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue provides protection for Ziel and Carmine using a wall of blue-white power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Little Blue put her foot on G-42’s chest and whistled in triumph.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Little Blue accompanied Ziel on a mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Little Blue cheered with Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Little Blue is a character who flew away in excitement when Ziel drifted off.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
